title_descriptor: Flame Retardant, High Visible, Safety Jacket Fabric
page_title: Flame Retardant, High Visible, Safety Jacket Fabric - ArNeo Pro - Ariteks
spec_line: 150 g/m², 100% Polyester, High Visible, Flame Retardant Knit Fabric
description_blocks: ArNeo Pro is 100% polyester, 150 g/m² warp knitted flame retardant neon colored fabric for safety jackets.
It is mostly used by aeroport apron workers.
Neon dyed fabrics they attract more attention than other colors. They absorb uv light and reflect as a visible light.
As a result they shine more than other objects.
Flame retardant certified. (TS EN ISO 14116) (resistant to 10 washing)

technical_documents.label: >> ArNeo Pro Data Sheet

text_blocks.text: High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics. Protection Technical Textiles
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
150 g/m² , 100% Polyester, High Visible, Flame Retardant Knit Fabric

ArNeo Pro is 100% polyester, 150 g/m² warp knitted flame retardant neon colored fabric for safety jackets. It is mostly used by aeroport apron workers. EN ISO 20471 certified. Neon dyed fabrics they attract more attention than other colors. They absorb uv light and reflect as a visible light. As a result they shine more than other objects. Flame retardant certified. (TS EN ISO 14116) (resistant to 10 washing) Technical Parameters Fiber 100% Polyester (PES) EN ISO 2076 Yarn 75/72 Denier EN ISO 2060 Weight 150 ±5 g/m² EN ISO 3081 Width 1500 ±20 mm EN ISO 3932 Bursting strengt > 1000 kPa (kN/m² ) EN ISO 13938-1 Dimensional Change -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% EN ISO 5077 Rubbing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X12 Perspiration Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 E04 Washing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 C06 Dry Cleaning Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 D01 Hypochlorite Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N01 Hot Press Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X11 pH 6.2 EN ISO 3071 Azo Test No Azo Colorants. EN ISO 14362-1 Application Safety Jacket Quality Management Done ISO 9001 High Visibility Done EN ISO 20471 Flame Retardant Done EN ISO 14116 Technical Documents >> ArNeo Pro Data Sheet Certificates TS EN ISO 20471 TS EN ISO 14116 TS EN ISO 20471 Test Report
